nasb.text: Jehoshaphat said, “The word of the Lord is with him.” So the king of Israel and Jehoshaphat and the king of Edom went down to him.

esv.text: And Jehoshaphat said, “The word of the Lord is with him.” So the king of Israel and Jehoshaphat and the king of Edom went down to him.

cnv.text: 約沙法說：“他必有耶和華的話。”於是以色列王、約沙法和以東王都下到他那裡。

ccb.text: 约沙法说：“耶和华会借他说话。”于是以色列王、犹大王和以东王一起去见以利沙。
